rationale: All lens checks confirmed at d327cdce. isValidPanelGateKey (cmd/mindspec/panel.go:342-349) iterates config.PanelGateKeys (config.go:101, the single enum) with no second literal copy: `grep -rn '"spec_approve"' cmd/mindspec internal/panel` returns nothing. Invalid --gate is rejected via guard.NewFailure naming all five keys (panel.go:127-132), computed before any root/config resolution or filesystem write (validation runs at lines 96-132, before findRoot/panelDirFor/panel.Create). --gate goes through rejectControlBytes (line 109) exactly like --bead/--target, and correctly BEFORE the enum-membership check so a control-byte value never reaches a rendered message. `go list -deps ./internal/panel | grep internal/config` exits non-zero, confirming the config-free leaf. TestPanelCreate_GateInvalidRejectedBeforeWrite is real: it snapshots the tree before/after via snapshotTree+reflect.DeepEqual (proving nothing was written), has a control-byte-in-gate subtest, and asserts every config.PanelGateKeys member appears in the error for the unknown-value case. `go test ./cmd/mindspec -run Gate -v` and the full cmd/mindspec, internal/panel, internal/config, internal/complete suites all pass.
